sectiondef.header: ANSI Color Codes for console output

briefdescription.para: ANSI color code for red.
ANSI color code for yellow.
ANSI color code to reset.
Log event none.
Log event HDMITX Init.
Log event VTC Init.
Log event HDCP Timer Init.
Log event HDCP 14 Init.
Log event HDCP 22 Init.
Log event Remap reset Init.
Log event Remapper Init.
Log event HDMITXSS Start.
Log event HDMITXSS Stop.
Log event HDMITXSS Reset.
Log event Cable connect.
Log event HPD toggle.
Log event Cable disconnect.
Log event Stream Up.
Log event Stream Down.
Log event Stream Start.
Log event Set Audio Channels.
Log event Audio Mute.
Log event Audio Unmute.
Log event HDMITXSS Setstream.
Log event HDCP 1.4 AuthReq.
Log event HDCP 2.2 AuthReq.
Log event Unsupported Pixel Repetition.
Log event Resolution Unsupported by VTC.
VID-OUT bridge unlocked.
Dummy Event should be last.
This typedef defines the HDMI TX Subsystem log events.
Leading edge tolerance.
Lagging edge tolerance.
Unknown tolerance type.
This typedef defines the HPD tolerance types.
No content protection.
HDCP 1.4.
HDCP 2.2.
Both HDCP 1.4 and 2.2.
These constants specify the HDCP protection schemes.
Handler for connect event.
Handler for toggle event.
Handler for bridge unlocked event.
Handler for bridge overflow event.
Handler for bridge underflow event.
Handler for vsync event.
Handler for stream down event.
Handler for stream up event.
Handler for HDCP authenticated event.
Handler for HDCP downstream topology available event.
Handler for HDCP unauthenticated event.
These constants specify different types of handler and used to differentiate interrupt requests from peripheral.
< prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
Callback type for interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function looks for the device configuration based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: The table XV_HdmiTxSs_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration information for each instance of the device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the device being looked up

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration table entry corresponding to the given device ID, or NULL if no match is found

briefdescription.para: This function returns the Index number of config table using BaseAddress.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the instance structure
address of the instance

simplesect.para: Index number of the config table

briefdescription.para: This function sets the core into HDMI mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI TX Subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function sets the core into DVI mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI TX Subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function calls the interrupt handler for HDMI TX.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI TX Subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the video subsystem and included sub-cores.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the subsystem. Initialization includes setting up the instance data for top level as well as all included sub-core therein, and ensuring the hardware is in a known stable state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
points to the configuration structure associated with the subsystem instance.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization is successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function will set the major and minor application version in TXSs struct.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.
is the major version of the application.
is the minor version of the application.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the HDMI TX subsystem including all sub-cores that are included in the processing pipeline for a given use-case.

detaileddescription.para:
Video pipe is started from back to front
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
None
Cores are started only if the corresponding start flag in the scratch pad memory is set. This allows to selectively start only those cores included in the processing chain

briefdescription.para: This function stops the HDMI TX subsystem including all sub-cores Stop the video pipe starting from front to back.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the video subsystem sub-cores.

detaileddescription.para:
There are 2 reset networks within the subsystem
For cores that are on AXIS interface
For cores that are on AXI-MM interface

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function asserts or releases the Internal Video reset of the HDMI subcore within the subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is a flag to assert (TRUE) or release (FALSE) the reset.

briefdescription.para: This function asserts or releases the Internal Link reset of the HDMI subcore within the subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is a flag to assert (TRUE) or release (FALSE) the reset.

briefdescription.para: This function asserts or releases the video reset of other blocks within the subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is a flag to assert (TRUE) or release (FALSE) the reset.

briefdescription.para: This function asserts or releases the system reset of other blocks within the subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
is a flag to assert (TRUE) or release (FALSE) the reset.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the HDMI TX AUX GCP register AVMUTE bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the HDMI TX AUX GCP register AVMUTE bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the HDMI TX AUX GCP register CLEAR_AVMUTE bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the HDMI TX AUX GCP register CLEAR_AVMUTE bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ----------------------- --------------------------------------------- (XV_HDMITXSS_HANDLER_CONNECT) HpdCallback (XV_HDMITXSS_HANDLER_VS) VsCallback (XV_HDMITXSS_HANDLER_STREAM_DOWN) StreamDownCallback (XV_HDMITXSS_HANDLER_STREAM_UP) StreamUpCallback (XV_HDMITXSS_HANDLER_BRDGOVERFLOW) BrdgOverflowCallback (XV_HDMITXSS_HANDLER_BRDGUNDERFLOW) BrdgUnderflowCallback (XV_HDMITXSS_HANDLER_HDCP_AUTHENTICATED) (XV_HDMITXSS_HANDLER_HDCP_DOWNSTREAM_TOPOLOGY_AVAILABLE) (XV_HDMITXSS_HANDLER_HDCP_UNAUTHENTICATED)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI TX Subsystem instance.
specifies the type of handler.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.
XST_INVALID_PARAM when HandlerType is invalid.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the HDMI Sink EDID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.
is a pointer to the buffer where EDID data will be stored.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if EDID read was successful.
XST_FAILURE if EDID read failed.

briefdescription.para: This function reads one block from the HDMI Sink EDID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.
is a pointer to the buffer where EDID data will be stored.
is the EDID segment number to read.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if EDID read was successful.
XST_FAILURE if EDID read failed.

briefdescription.para: This function shows the HDMI source edid.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables / disables the TX scrambler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.
TRUE:Enable scrambler FALSE:Disable scrambler

simplesect.para: The scrambler setting will revert to the default behavior during the next stream configuration (scrambler is enabled for HDMI 2.0 video and disabled when the video is of HDMI 1.4 or lower)

briefdescription.para: This function starts the HDMI TX stream.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sends audio info frames.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.
is a pointer to the auxiliary data to send.

briefdescription.para: This function sends generic info frames.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.
is a pointer to the auxiliary data structure.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if infoframes transmitted successfully.
XST_FAILURE if AUX FIFO is full.

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the HDMI TX SS number of active audio channels.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function set HDMI TX audio parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.
0: Unmute the audio 1: Mute the audio.

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the HDMI TX SS Audio Format.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance
1:HBR 0:L-PCM

briefdescription.para: This function gets the active audio format.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

simplesect.para: Active audio format of HDMI Tx Subsystem

briefdescription.para: This function returns the pointer to HDMI TX SS Aux structure.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function returns the pointer to HDMI TX SS AVI InfoFrame structure.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function returns the pointer to HDMI TX SS Audio InfoFrame structure.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function returns the pointer to HDMI TX SS Vendor Specific InfoFrame structure.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance

memberdef.argsstring: (XV_HdmiTxSs *InstancePtr, XVidC_VideoMode VideoMode, XVidC_ColorFormat ColorFormat, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc, XVidC_3DInfo *Info3D)
memberdef.name: XV_HdmiTxSs_SetStream

briefdescription.para: This function set HDMI TX subsystem stream parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.
is the video mode to set.
is the color format to set.
is the bits per component (color depth).
is a pointer to 3D information structure.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the pointer to HDMI TX SS video stream.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the HDMI TX SS video stream.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance
is the video stream properties to set.

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the HDMI TX SS video Identification code.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance
Value

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the HDMI TX SS video Identification code.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance
is the Video Identification Code value to set.

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the HDMI TX SS video stream type.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance
specifies the stream type (1:HDMI 0:DVI)

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the HDMI TX SS video stream type.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance
1:IsScrambled 0: not Scrambled

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the HDMI TX SS video stream scrambling behaviour.

detaileddescription.para: Setting OverrideScramble to true will force enabling/disabling scrambling function based on the value of IsScrambled flag.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance

0: Scrambling is always enabled for HDMI 2.0 resolutions and is enabled /or disabled for HDMI 1.4 resolutions based on IsScrambled value 1: Enable scrambling if IsScrambled is TRUE and disable scrambling if IsScrambled is FALSE

briefdescription.para: This function Sets the HDMI TX SS TMDS Cock Ratio.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function returns the HDMI TX SS TMDS clock frequency.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to XV_HdmiTxSs instance

briefdescription.para: This function detects connected sink is a HDMI 2.0/HDMI 1.4 sink device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if HDMI 2.0
XST_FAILURE if HDMI 1.4

briefdescription.para: This function is called when HDMI TX SS TMDS clock changes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function prints the HDMI TX SS subcore versions.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the video stream is up.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.

listitem.para: TRUE if stream is up.
FALSE if stream is down.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the interface is connected.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.

listitem.para: TRUE if the interface is connected.
FALSE if the interface is not connected.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the interface has toggled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.

listitem.para: TRUE if the interface HPD has toggled.
FALSE if the interface HPD has not toggled.

briefdescription.para: This function determines if the connected HDMI sink is HDCP 1.4 capable.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.

listitem.para: TRUE if sink is HDCP 1.4 capable and ready to authenticate.
FALSE if sink does not support HDCP 1.4 or is not ready.

briefdescription.para: This function determines if the connected HDMI sink is HDCP 2.2 capable.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.

listitem.para: TRUE if sink is HDCP 2.2 capable and ready to authenticate.
FALSE if sink does not support HDCP 2.2 or is not ready.

briefdescription.para: This function will set the default in HDF.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.
is the XV_HdmiTxSs ID to operate on.

briefdescription.para: This function will set PPC specified by user.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.
is the XV_HdmiTxSs ID to operate on.
is the PPC to be set.

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the driver's logging mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the xv_hdmitxss core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will insert an event in the driver's logginc mechanism.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.
is the event type to log.
is the associated data for the event.

briefdescription.para: This function will read the last event from the log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will print the entire log.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will enable the video masking.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will disable the video masking.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function will enable or disable the noise in the video mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the Noise.

briefdescription.para: This function will set the red component in the video mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.
specifies the video mask value set to red component

briefdescription.para: This function will set the green component in the video mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.
specifies the video mask value set to green component

briefdescription.para: This function will set the blue component in the video mask.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.
specifies the video mask value set to blue component

briefdescription.para: This function configures the background color for Video Masking Feature.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the core instance to be worked on.
is the background color requested

briefdescription.para: This function will get the current video mask mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.

simplesect.para: Current mode. 0 = Video masking is disabled 1 = Video masking is enabled

briefdescription.para: This function will Configure Timegrid based on the tolerance value for HPD and Toggle event.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs core instance.
is the tolerance type.
is the tolerance value to be applied.

briefdescription.para: This is main header file of the Xilinx HDMI TX Subsystem driver.

detaileddescription.para: HDMI TX Subsystem is a collection of IP cores bounded together by software to provide an abstract view of the processing pipe. It hides all the complexities of programming the underlying cores from end user.

HDMI Subsystem supports following features
AXI Stream Input/Output interface
1, 2 or 4 pixel-wide video interface
8/10/12/16 bits per component
RGB & YCbCr color space
Up to 4k2k 60Hz resolution at both Input and Output interface
Interlaced input support (1080i 50Hz/60Hz)

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 10/07/15 Initial release. 1.1 yh 15/01/16 Add 3D Support 1.2 yh 20/01/16 Added remapper support 1.3 yh 01/02/16 Added set_ppc api 1.4 MG 03/02/16 Added HDCP support 1.5 MG 09/03/16 Removed reduced blanking support and added XV_HdmiTxSS_SetHdmiMode and XV_HdmiTxSS_SetDviMode 1.6 MH 03/15/16 Added HDCP connect event 1.7 YH 17/03/16 Remove xintc.h as it is processor dependent 1.8 YH 18/03/16 Add XV_HdmiTxSs_SendGenericAuxInfoframe function 1.9 MH 23/06/16 Added HDCP repeater support. 1.10 YH 25/07/16 Used UINTPTR instead of u32 for BaseAddress 1.11 MH 08/08/16 Updates to optimize out HDCP when excluded. 1.12 YH 18/08/16 Combine Report function into one ReportInfo Add Event Log 1.13 YH 27/08/16 Remove unused function XV_HdmiTxSs_SetUserTimerHandler 1.14 YH 14/11/16 Added API to enable/disable YUV420/Pixel Repeat Mode for video bridge 1.15 YH 14/11/16 Remove Remapper APIs as remapper feature is moved to video bridge and controlled by HDMI core 1.16 mmo 03/01/17 Add compiler option(XV_HDMITXSS_LOG_ENABLE) to enable Log Re-order the enumeration and data structure 1.17 mmo 02/03/17 Added XV_HdmiTxSs_ReadEdidSegment API for Multiple Segment Support and HDMI Compliance Test 4.0 YH 19/07/17 Added Video Masking APIs MH 09/08/17 Added function XV_HdmiTxSs_HdcpSetCapability 22/08/17 Added function XV_HdmiTxSs_SetAudioFormat EB 10/10/17 Added function XV_HdmiTxSs_GetAudioFormat 5.0 YH 16/01/18 Added dedicated reset for each clock domain Added bridge unlock interrupt Added PIO_OUT to set GCP_AVMUTE EB 17/01/18 Added InfoFrame data structure to XV_HdmiTxSs Added XV_HDMITXSS_LOG_EVT_PIX_REPEAT_ERR log event Added functions XV_HdmiTxSs_GetAuxiliary, XV_HdmiTxSs_GetAviInfoframe, XV_HdmiTxSs_GetAudioInfoframe, XV_HdmiTxSs_GetVSIF Updated the return type of the function XV_HdmiTxSs_SendGenericAuxInfoframe EB 23/01/18 Added function XV_HdmiTxSs_SetVideoStreamHdmi14ScramblingOverrideFlag 25/01/18 Added function XV_HdmiTxSs_SetScrambler mmo 08/02/18 Added LowResolutionSupp & YUV420Supp in the XV_HdmiTxSs_Config SM 28/02/18 Added XV_HdmiTxSS_SetAppVersion API and AppMajVer and AppMinVer version number in XV_HdmiTxSs structure MMO 11/08/18 Added Bridge Overflow and Bridge Underflow Interrupt
